# XCTKVOExpectation

**Class**

An expectation that a specific key-value observing (KVO) condition fulfills.

## Declaration

```swift
class XCTKVOExpectation
```

## Overview

Apple discourages the use of this symbol in Swift. Use [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTKeyPathExpectation] instead.

## Creating KVO expectations

- **init(keyPath:object:)**: Creates an expectation that any KVO change to the specified key path of the observed object fulfills.
- **init(keyPath:object:expectedValue:)**: Creates an expectation a KVO change fulfills when it causes the specified key path of the observed object to have an expected value.
- **init(keyPath:object:expectedValue:options:)**: Creates an expectation with custom observation options that a KVO change fulfills when it causes the specified key path of the observed object to have an expected value.

## Expectation properties

- **keyPath**: The key path the system observes for KVO changes.
- **observedObject**: The object that the system observes for KVO changes.
- **expectedValue**: The value that the key path’s specified property must equal to fulfill the expectation.
- **options**: The key-value observing options the expectation uses when registering for observation.

## Custom KVO evaluation

- **handler**: An optional handler that performs custom evaluation of changes to the observed key path.
- **XCTKVOExpectation.Handler**: A custom handler to call when observing a KVO change for a specified key path.

## Key Value Observing Expectations

- **XCTKeyPathExpectation**: An expectation that a specific key-value observing (KVO) condition fulfills.

## Inherits From

- XCTestExpectation

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
